name: Leopard Energy, Inc.
business: Leopard Energy focuses on acquiring energy production and development opportunities in the U.S., primarily through royalty interests in producing oil wells. The company generates revenue from monthly distributions of its share of oil production, net of expenses, from properties managed by non-affiliated third parties. It intends to complete additional acquisitions of similar royalty interests to expand its presence in the U.S. energy sector.

exposures.sentence: On January 17, 2024, the Company purchased a 5% royalty interest in a package of seven (7) producing oil wells located in the Eagle Ford Shale, Lavaca County, Texas (the Eagle Acquisition).
